title: claude-provider-beta-fingerprint-realign data contracts
description: Type contracts for the refactored assembleBetas() function and its peer interfaces. Single source of truth; TypeScript interfaces derive from these.

ProviderRoute.description: Where the request is being routed. Mirrors upstream pq() return values. Only firstParty is exercised by opencode today. The set {firstParty, anthropicAws, foundry, mantle} forms isFirstPartyish (upstream $Q()).

ModelId.description: Anthropic model id string. Examples: claude-opus-4-7, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, claude-sonnet-4-6-20250627.

isOAuth.description: True iff auth is OAuth/subscription (not bare API key). Upstream: i7().

modelId.description: Model id, used for haiku-detection, 1M-context eligibility, and thinking support. Optional only for tests; production callers always provide it.

fastMode.description: Whether fast mode is enabled. Currently unused by ZR1 but kept for env-driven beta append.

effort.description: Whether the effort parameter is used. Triggers no flag in current ZR1; reserved.

taskBudget.description: Whether task-budget is specified. Triggers no flag in current ZR1; reserved.

envBetas.description: Extra betas from process.env.ANTHROPIC_BETAS (comma-split). Appended last, before dedup.

provider.description: NEW. Routing target. firstParty enables context-management beta gate; bedrock/vertex/foundry suppress it.

showThinkingSummaries.description: NEW. If true, suppresses redact-thinking-2026-02-12. Upstream: v7().showThinkingSummaries === true.

disableExperimentalBetas.description: NEW. If true, suppresses context-management-2025-06-27 (and structured-outputs when activated). Resolved by provider.ts from process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS.

disableInterleavedThinking.description: If true, suppresses interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14 AND redact-thinking-2026-02-12. Resolved from process.env.DISABLE_INTERLEAVED_THINKING.

isInteractive.description: NEW (DD-13). True iff running in interactive TTY mode. Upstream: !I7(). Gates redact-thinking-2026-02-12. Default false because opencode runs as a daemon, not a TTY.

BetaFlag.description: Closed enumeration of flags assembleBetas() may emit. envBetas can append arbitrary extras outside this set.

AssembleBetasOutput.description: Output of assembleBetas. ORDERED; not a set. Order MUST match upstream ZR1 push order. Caller comma-joins for the anthropic-beta header.

ModelPredicate.description: Result of a model-attribute helper. Each helper takes a ModelId and returns boolean.

supports1MContext.description: Prefix match against CONTEXT_1M_MODELS. Upstream: DP(q).

supportsThinking.description: All current claude-* models return true. Upstream: ggq(q).

supportsContextManagement.description: Upstream: iO_(q). Predicate to be reverse-engineered during designed→planned. Risk R-1 in design.md.
